name: Messmer
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

He never cared much for a consort but ever since he had laid eyes on you, Messmer suddenly wished that he was as handsome as Godwyn, as charming as Miquella or at least as confident as Radahn. Yet he was always tongue-tied around you, cursing himself for his awkwardness and cursing Radahn for wanting what was his.

cw for light stalking and obsessiveness

|| pre-Shattering || Messmer is a bit of a yandere || he's also adorably awkward || he's a mama's boy but will defy her for you || Messmer is not as kind as Radahn ||

Here we have the scenario from the pov of Messmer. I can't help but imagine a younger Messmer to be this awkward and obsessive guy who just really wants to get along with others but kind of just fails at it. He's also a touch-starved munchkin and wants to be loved.

In this version he is not born with the Base Serpent but it's built on the theory that the serpent was later sealed within him by Marika to keep his flame in check - and the serpent.

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

https://lokeysouls.com

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

Art is by Kanryo on tumblr.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
